'''Jussafet Four''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] attacked by [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] [[Zsinj]]. It was a [[Mining/Legends|mining]] world under the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], and its inhabitants also mined the [[Jussafet asteroids]].

{{Planet-stub}}
